linkedin.text:
Summer 2026 corporate events — we're down to last few slots.

Every year around this time, we have the same conversation with a few companies:

"We want to do something amazing for the team this summer. Can you still do it?"

The honest answer: sometimes yes, sometimes no. And the difference between "yes" and "no" is usually 4-6 weeks.

Here's where we are for summer 2026 (June-August):
✅ July: 2 slots remaining
⚠️ August: 1 slot remaining (limited — peak season constraints)
✅ June: 3 slots remaining

Popular destinations still available: Lisbon, Porto, Seville, Barcelona, Athens, Split, Dubrovnik.

Groups of 20-150 people. Full production: flights, hotel, program, activities, gala dinner, branding.

If you have budget approved for a summer 2026 team event, now is the time to move.

The alternative: waiting until June, losing hotel availability and flight pricing, ending up with a diminished version of what you wanted.

DM me directly or email alon@upe.co.il. First 5 inquiries this week get a complimentary destination analysis and budget estimate.

🌐 upe.co.il

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #Summer2026 #EventPlanning #UproductionEvents #MICE #TeamBuilding #CorporateTravel #HRLeadership #BookNow #EventProduction

facebook.text:
Every May we have the same conversation with a few companies: "We want to do something amazing for the team this summer. Can you still pull it off?" 🌞

The honest answer is sometimes yes, sometimes no — and the difference usually comes down to 4-6 weeks.

Here's where summer 2026 stands right now: June has 3 slots, July has 2, and August is down to a single slot because peak season locks up fast.

Lisbon, Porto, Seville, Barcelona, Athens, Split and Dubrovnik are all still on the table for groups of 20-150, full production included — flights, hotel, program, gala, branding.

If the budget's approved, waiting until June usually means losing the hotel and flight pricing you wanted and settling for a smaller version of the idea.

Tell us your team size and dates in the comments, or send us a message and we'll check real availability today. 💬

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventPlanning #MICE
